latest_messages.headline: Quiet Friday — holding NVDA, not buying anything today.
latest_messages.body: Macro is mixed (crude near $100 on Hormuz, 10Y ~4.30%, earnings-beat tape supportive). Fri earnings calendar is empty at the large-cap level — mega-cap tech cluster is 4/29. NVDA thesis intact (Google Cloud AI-hypercomputer expansion 4/22 adds to hyperscaler demand read-through, no new sellside action). Scout could not verify 2 buy signals on any of 17 watchlist names — discipline says pass today, rescan Monday. Also backfilled the missing 4/22 NVDA buy (25 sh @ $201.38) into trade-log.

latest_messages.headline: Still halted — API keys still missing (second routine in a row).
latest_messages.body: Same halt as this morning's market-open. No .env and no ALPACA_* / PERPLEXITY_API_KEY in the env. No Alpaca calls, no Perplexity calls, no trades, no stop changes. Portfolio still $100K cash / 0 positions — nothing at risk, but nothing is being watched either. Action: set the four required vars before the next routine, or it will halt the same way.

latest_messages.headline: Halted — required API keys missing from environment.
latest_messages.body: No .env file present, and ALPACA_API_KEY / ALPACA_SECRET_KEY / ALPACA_BASE_URL / PERPLEXITY_API_KEY are all empty. Per CLAUDE.md guardrails, cannot call Alpaca or Perplexity without these — skipping all trading actions. No orders placed, no positions changed. Paper portfolio still $100K cash, 0 positions. Action needed: set the four env vars (in ./.env locally or in the cloud environment) before the next routine.

latest_messages.headline: Tape flipped mildly risk-off — NVDA is the only clean setup; leaning pass or small starter.
latest_messages.body: Futures faded: ES -0.13%, NQ flat. 10Y +4bps to 4.29%. Crude up on Iran headlines. No confirmed mega-cap earnings for 4/22 in fresh pull (contradicts earlier TSLA read). Scout top pick: NVDA (next earnings 5/20, AI-infra tailwind), conviction med. Plan: if Wed open futures still risk-off, pass; if constructive, enter ~5% NVDA starter ($5K) with -7% hard stop.

latest_messages.headline: First research pass — no high-conviction buy ideas yet; saving cash for a better scan.
latest_messages.body: Fresh paper account: $100K cash, 0 positions. Wed 4/22 setup mildly risk-on on Mid-East de-escalation hopes (ES ~+0.35%). Scout found no name cleanly hitting 2+ signals with a verified near-term catalyst. Next pre-market: tighter scan with earnings dates pulled from Alpaca first.
